sections: Frozen full-file baseline at git:214a5b8eb182fce74478df49d4f55d226d65fdf5 with SHA-256 c7f61db209a81ba20690f365b4069dd01f11e395335bfa10d2ce21143cc2985d
Superseded terminal semantic-routing subject and review contract

contracts_and_gates: Human decision: abandon and supersede the machine-readable trigger, route-inventory, co-activation, operation-fixture, fanout, and semantic-dependency completeness design; do not build an automatic semantic routing engine

Retain only stable 05 index, 6–8 cohesive canonical leaves, byte-identical frozen payload movement, heading/anchor/link/fence/parity validation, immutable history, explicit future packet/dispatch leaf selection, and subject-only manifests
Frozen HCM-0.4 05 baseline at git:214a5b8eb182fce74478df49d4f55d226d65fdf5 and SHA-256 c7f61db209a81ba20690f365b4069dd01f11e395335bfa10d2ce21143cc2985d
Subject manifests contain current reviewed bytes only; unchanged contextual authority stays in authority_refs and/or contracts_and_gates
Redesign Review 1 of maximum two; at most one remediation and one different fresh Redesign Review 2; if Review 2 is not CLEAN, abandon decomposition and retain the monolith
allowed_scope: Replay and review the exact nine-file planning subject read-only.
Independently derive the eight contiguous leaf spans, file/body/span digests, 48 H2/22 H3 ownership, and byte-reconstruction claims from the frozen Git baseline.

Judge whether the eight leaves are cohesive and whether the stable index, compatibility aliases, explicit future leaf selection, immutable history, and rollback boundaries are complete and executable.
Verify every active planning representation abandons automatic semantic routing and preserves the subject-manifest versus unchanged-authority rule.
Run read-only Markdown, scope, archive, handoff, Git, and GitNexus checks as useful.
non_goals: No edits, commits, new dispatches, handoff records, ledger writes, or user task hops by the reviewer.
No decomposition or edit of 05-contracts-schemas-and-gates.md; no HCM-0.9 execution.
No semantic dependency audit, automatic routing design, Rust, Cargo, runtime, CLI, Tauri, Substrate, SDK/public API, HCM-0.5, or unrelated planning improvement.
Do not rely on parent conclusions or prior reviewer findings; independently judge the exact current subject and live authority.
tasks: Replay the sorted nine-path SHA-256 manifest and fingerprint; confirm it contains every and only file whose current bytes form this review subject.
Verify the frozen baseline identity and independently derive all eight exact spans, per-span digests, 48 H2/22 H3 counts, complete ordered coverage, and body reconstruction.
Review the eight-leaf topology for cohesion, contiguous ownership, fence-safe boundaries, and completeness without reintroducing semantic dependency machinery.
Review stable-index discovery/compatibility behavior, all 70 historical aliases/targets, no duplicate normative payload, and explicit packet/dispatch-authored leaf selection.

Verify the mechanical verifier plan and negative tests are sufficient for bytes, headings, anchors, links, fences, parseable examples, immutable history, manifests, and scope, while expressly excluding automatic semantic routing.
Verify subject manifests contain only reviewed bytes, changed files are manifested, and unchanged contextual authority remains outside the manifest.
Verify rollback retains the monolith on any failure and that planning approval does not authorize HCM-0.9 execution or HCM-0.5.
Return findings first ordered Critical, Required, Optional, Nit with exact file/line evidence and smallest remediation. Return CLEAN only when no actionable finding remains.
stop_conditions: Return BLOCKED if the complete manifest subject, frozen baseline, or required read-only validation is unavailable.
Return Critical or Required rather than authorizing decomposition, execution, automatic semantic routing, historical rewrite, Rust/runtime work, HCM-0.5, or unrelated improvement.
Do not modify repository state or write orchestration artifacts.
repo_truth: Planning/control-only HCM-0.9 mechanical redesign candidate on feat/handbook-contract-membrane at HEAD 76419b074d9ee406b41c89c0ed1413c206ad9b4f. The nine manifest files are the only bytes under review. They replace the abandoned eleven-leaf semantic-routing design with eight contiguous mechanical spans, a stable discovery/compatibility index, explicit packet/dispatch-authored leaf selection, and no inferred dependency closure. Frozen body coverage is 3,755 lines with 48 H2 and 22 H3 headings. The prior trigger/route subject remains immutable historical evidence at commit 5e3d5ba. HCM-0.9 execution is not authorized in this session.
